title: Atlassian security advisory (AV26-731)
description: On July 21, 2026, Atlassian published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities, including some critical ones, in the following products:
products: Bamboo Data Center and Server  multiple versions
Bitbucket Data Center and Server  multiple versions
Confluence Data Center and Server  multiple versions
Crowd Data Center and Server  multiple versions
Jira Data Center and Server  multiple versions
Jira Service Management Data Center and Server  multiple versions
Sourcetree for Mac  all versions from 3.4.11 to 3.4.12
Sourcetree for Windows  all versions from 3.4.11 to 3.4.12
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
